ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Code of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "mean_quantity" REAL /* Average quantity of the product sold over a period */,
  "prod_code" TEXT /* Product code of the item purchased */,
  "basket_size" TEXT /* Size category of the basket (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "spend" REAL /* Total spend amount of the transaction */,
  "basket_type" TEXT /* Type of basket (e.g., Full Shop, Top Up) */,
  "basket_price_sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the basket pricing */,
  "total_spend_per_basket" REAL /* Total spend calculated for the basket */,
  "cust_code" TEXT /* Code of the customer making the purchase */,
  "cust_price_sensitivity" TEXT /* Customer's sensitivity to product pricing */,
  "shop_weekday" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the day of the week */,
  "shop_week" INTEGER /* Week of the year for the transaction */,
  "basket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the basket */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash, Mobile Pay) */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if a discount was applied to the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied, if any */,
  "employee_code" TEXT /* Code of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "return_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the transaction involved a return */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount of the return, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_cust_code FOREIGN KEY ("cust_code") REFERENCES customers ("cust_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_shop_week FOREIGN KEY ("shop_week") REFERENCES shop_weeks ("shop_week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_basket_type FOREIGN KEY ("basket_type") REFERENCES basket_types ("basket_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_cust_price_sensitivity FOREIGN KEY ("cust_price_sensitivity") REFERENCES price_sensitivity ("price_sensitivity_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_prod_code FOREIGN KEY ("prod_code") REFERENCES products ("prod_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the store */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Current status of the store (e.g., Open, Closed, Renovating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "prod_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "prod_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "supplier_code" TEXT /* Code of the supplier for the product */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Current inventory status (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock, Low Stock) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which the product should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory update */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prod_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "cust_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., Regular, Premium, Occasional) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "preferred_store" TEXT /* Code of the preferred store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "basket_types" (
  "basket_type" TEXT /* Type of basket (e.g., Full Shop, Top Up) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the basket type */,
  "average_basket_size" REAL /* Average size of baskets of this type */,
  "average_spend" REAL /* Average spend for baskets of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basket_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_sensitivity" (
  "price_sensitivity_code" TEXT /* Code indicating price sensitivity (e.g., UM, LA, MM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price sensitivity level */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Customer segment associated with the price sensitivity */,
  "average_discount_tolerated" REAL /* Average discount percentage the segment can tolerate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_sensitivity_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_weeks" (
  "shop_week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Numeric week number of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the shop week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the shop week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the shop week */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the year for the shop week (e.g., Winter, Spring, Summer, Fall) */,
  "holiday_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the week includes a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basket_summary" (
  "basket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the basket */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of products in the basket */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent in the basket */,
  "average_spend" REAL /* Average spend per item in the basket */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total number of items in the basket */,
  "unique_products" INTEGER /* Number of unique products in the basket */,
  "average_quantity_per_product" REAL /* Average quantity of each product in the basket */,
  "most_expensive_product" TEXT /* Code of the most expensive product in the basket */,
  "cheapest_product" TEXT /* Code of the cheapest product in the basket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basket_id")
)
